# Sown

## Effect

The first time you play this card each combat, gain Energy.

## Sources And Targets

| Source | Source type | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Sapphire Seed | Event: Overgrowth | 1 card |

## Notes

- Cards can only have one enchantment.
